info.description: This is the backend API for the Booking System Application.
info.title: Booking System API

get.description: Returns a list of all rooms
Returns a list of all seats in a room

post.description: Creates a new seat in a room

delete.description: Deletes a seat from a room

get.description: Returns a list of all users

put.description: Updates the role of a user

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a token

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Updates the profile of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Deactivates the currently authenticated user account

put.description: Changes the password of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a token

get.description: Returns all reservations based on filters
Returns all reservations for the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Cancels a specific reservation by ID

get.description: Returns a list of all active rooms available for booking
Returns all seats for a specific room
